description: Sort samples in descending order by the chosen attribute.
payloadDescription: Payload for sorting samples by an attribute.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

description: Retain or remove samples by exact discrete values.
payloadDescription: Retain or remove samples by exact discrete values.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

payloadFields.name: remove
payloadFields.description: If true, matching samples are removed instead of retained.

description: Retain or remove samples using a numeric comparison.
payloadDescription: Payload for filtering samples by comparing a quantitative attribute against a numeric operand.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

payloadFields.name: operand
payloadFields.description: Numeric threshold used in the comparison.

description: Group samples by the distinct values of the chosen attribute.
payloadDescription: Payload for grouping by a categorical attribute.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

description: Group samples into quartiles by the chosen quantitative attribute.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

description: Group samples by user-defined numeric thresholds.
payloadDescription: Group samples by user-defined numeric thresholds.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

payloadFields.name: thresholds
payloadFields.description: Thresholds used to stratify the samples.

description: Retain samples from the first n categories in the current ordering.
payloadDescription: Retain samples from the first n categories in the current ordering.

payloadFields.name: attribute
payloadFields.description: Attribute identifier used by the action.

payloadDescription: Payload for updating a bookmarkable parameter entry in provenance.

payloadFields.name: origin
payloadFields.description: Optional datum origin for replayable values.

description: Set the configured visibility of a view.
payloadDescription: Payload for setting a view visibility override.

payloadFields.name: visibility
payloadFields.description: Whether the view should be visible.

description: Clear the visibility override for a view.
payloadDescription: Payload for clearing a single visibility override.
